articles.title: THE BOSTON MARATHON GOT A NEW LOGO, AND RUNNERS ARE NOT HAPPY
articles.summary: The Boston Athletic Association's redesign of the Boston Marathon logo, which features a forward-facing, more muscular unicorn mascot and corporate branding from Bank of America, has sparked controversy among runners. The mixed response, with 55% of poll respondents disliking the new logo, underscores the challenge of balancing tradition and progress.

articles.title: META CHANGES ITS LABEL FROM ‘MADE WITH AI' TO ‘AI INFO' TO INDICATE USE OF AI IN PHOTOS
articles.summary: Meta started tagging edited photos as “Made with AI,” causing confusion among photographers who used essential editing tools. This led to the introduction of the new “AI Info” tag across all of its apps. The underlying technology for detecting AI remains unchanged, but the new label aims to clarify that not all tagged photos are fully AI-generated. The issue with undetected, completely AI-generated photos persists, and Meta and other platforms and editing tool providers need to create fair guidelines for photographers.

articles.title: THIS NEW MAC APP USES ANIMATED FLIES TO TELL YOU WHEN TO TAKE OUT THE TRASH
articles.summary: Bananabin offers a quirky design solution for managing your computer's Trash directory. It displays animated flies once trash data surpasses a specific threshold, with customization options for different storage limits. People can try the app by providing their email for a download link via the Bananabin website.

articles.title: WHY TOGGLE SWITCHES SUCK (AND WHAT TO DO INSTEAD)
10 BOOKS THAT SHAPED HOW I THINK ABOUT DESIGN, LIFE, AND CREATIVITY
articles.summary: The page lists 10 impactful books recommended by Patrick Morgan, co-founder of Loopable and creator of Better by Design, focusing on themes like mastery, creativity, ethics, and personal growth. It includes titles like "Range," "Mastery," and "Zen and the Art of Motorcycle Maintenance." The list aims to inspire designers and creative individuals through interdisciplinary learning.

articles.title: FIGMA AI: A NEW ERA OF DESIGN
articles.summary: Figma AI integrates advanced AI to streamline workflows, unlock creativity, and elevate the design process. These new tools revolutionize design efficiency and collaboration, from illustration and prototype generation to layer renaming automation.

articles.title: AI CSS ANIMATIONS
articles.summary: Create AI-powered complex animations using voice prompts and fine-tune the output.

articles.title: THE 2024 STATE OF USER RESEARCH
articles.summary: This year's State of User Research Report explores trends and challenges in user research based on insights from 759 professionals. Key topics include AI integration, research operations, and industry buy-in. The report offers valuable data for understanding the field's current and future directions.

articles.title: DASH THROUGH THE ENTIRE WEB DESIGN PROCESS
articles.summary: Scene is an all-in-one web design platform that takes you from ideation to launch. It features an AI assistant for wireframes and copy, seamless collaboration tools, and one-click publishing.

articles.title: THE FUTURE IS BUILT ON SOLID FOUNDATIONS
articles.summary: A robust design system is crucial for responsibly exploring emerging technologies like AI as it ensures consistency and efficiency. Investing in comprehensive design systems, fostering collaboration, and maintaining high-quality input is essential for successful AI integration.

articles.title: WEB EXPERIENCES DURING THE AGE OF LLMS
articles.summary: Web 3.0 features blockchain technologies, decentralization, AI, and ML, with Large Language Models (LLMs) significantly impacting web experiences through AI-capable website builders and direct site creation. While AI-generated websites like Designer GPT face content management and maintenance challenges, they promise to lower entry barriers, enhance efficiency, and allow users to focus on curation and publishing.

articles.title: AI ANXIETY AND HOW TO DESIGN FOR IT: RESOURCES AND BEST PRACTICES
articles.summary: AI anxiety affects nearly one-third of adults, with distinct concerns like learning anxiety, privacy violation, job replacement, and fear acquisition. To reduce AI anxiety, designers should use user-centered approaches, ensure transparency, comply with privacy regulations, and emphasize the value of human creativity alongside AI.

articles.title: HOW TO EMBRACE THE GOOD ENOUGH
articles.summary: Embracing "good enough" with realistic goals, celebrating small wins, and practicing mindfulness and self-care can prevent anxiety and build positive momentum.

articles.title: THE STATE OF CREATIVITY
articles.summary: This year's Cannes Lions revealed a shift in focus: AI, which dominated conversations in 2023, saw reduced presence due to its current unreliability, legal risks, and cumbersome processes.

articles.title: WHAT YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT ADOBE LIGHTROOM'S NEW AI FEATURE
articles.summary: Adobe Lightroom's Generative Remove uses Firefly AI to effortlessly erase unwanted elements and generate realistic backgrounds, saving designers considerable time and helping them streamline their workflow.
